backend/main.mo: Main actor defining accident report types (AccidentReport, FaultAnalysis, TrafficSignalState, PhotoMetadata, TrafficSign, Violation, UserProfile) and public functions for creating/retrieving reports, uploading photos, managing user profiles, calculating speed limits, and analyzing fault with Highway Code rules; includes blob storage and access control mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old AccidentReport schema to new schema by adding violations array and party1Liability/party2Liability fields, preserving all existing data during upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: GPS location in AccidentReportForm, ViolationsDisplay component, LiabilityDisplay component, and ReportDetail updates to show violations and liability percentages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing pre-generated summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities including routing, report forms, photo handling, velocity calculations, traffic sign detection, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including professional neutral grays optimized for legal documentation.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Legal Accident Documentation App.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app root component configuring TanStack Router with routes for new report creation (/), reports list (/reports), and individual report detail (/reports/$reportId) using Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AccidentReportFo: Comprehensive accident report form component with velocity calculations from distance/time inputs, road type selection, traffic light color, optional GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude), timestamp field, photo upload, and submission to backend via useCreateReport mutation.
frontend/src/components/DiscrepancyAlert: Displays a destructive alert when witness testimony about traffic signal state conflicts with AI-detected state from photos, showing both values side-by-side and prompting adjuster review.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (New Report, View Reports), outlet for nested routes, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LiabilityDisplay: Card component that visualizes liability assessment as a horizontal bar chart with percentages for two parties, color-coded by fault severity (red/orange/green based on percentage thresholds).
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Grid gallery component that displays accident photos as thumbnails with metadata, opens full-size modal dialog with navigation controls when clicked, and converts Uint8Array image data to blob URLs.
frontend/src/components/PhotoUpload.tsx: File upload component that accepts up to 10 image files (JPEG/PNG/WebP), converts them to ExternalBlob format, displays preview thumbnails with remove buttons, and notifies parent of changes.
frontend/src/components/ReportDetail.tsx: Detailed report view page that fetches and displays a complete accident report including liability assessment, discrepancy alerts, violations, speed data, photos, traffic signs, and location information with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ReportList.tsx: Displays a list of accident reports with thumbnails, sorted by timestamp descending. Handles loading states, errors, and navigation to individual report details.
frontend/src/components/SpeedDisplay.tsx: Displays calculated velocity in both m/s and mph with color-coded styling based on speed thresholds. Shows speed label and uses utility functions for color coding.
frontend/src/components/TrafficSignsDisp: Renders detected traffic signs from photos with icons, confidence badges, and metadata. Returns empty state message if no signs detected.
frontend/src/components/ViolationsDispla: Displays traffic violations with type-specific icons and timestamps. Shows success state with green checkmark if no violations detected.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages backend actor creation with authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated identities. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality and status tracking. Creates AuthClient with configurable options and manages identity lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and creating accident reports, including photo upload handling and simulated AI traffic sign detection. Manages photo storage in memory and coordinates with backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVelocityCalculatio: Calculates velocity in m/s and mph from distance and time inputs using memoization. Returns zero velocity if time is zero.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system for light and dark themes. Sets up CSS custom properties for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/NewReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders the AccidentReportForm with a header describing accident report creation with velocity calculations and AI fault analysis.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that extracts reportId from URL params and renders the ReportDetail component for displaying a single accident report.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Page component that displays the ReportList component with a header for viewing and managing all saved accident reports.
frontend/src/utils/speedColorCoding.ts: Utility functions that return color classes and labels for speed values categorized as low (0-30 mph), medium (31-70 mph), or high (>70 mph).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme settings, typography and animation plugins, and custom keyframes for UI components.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document defining a traffic sign detection app with violation detection (stop signs, U-turns, signals) and liability assessment features, listing existing and pending feature requests.
